summary: Phase 2 feature testing completed. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed for new features: GE ID system, dual upload zones, stats bar with Schemes, topic/difficulty filters. KaTeX is properly imported for LaTeX rendering.

issues: Minor React hydration warning: <span> inside <option> - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: GET /api/health - Returns healthy with storage initialized
GET /api/ - Returns API info
GET /api/topics - Returns 30 predefined GCSE topics
GET /api/topics/categories - Returns 4 categories (Number, Algebra, Geometry, Statistics)
POST /api/papers - Creates paper with ge_code field (GE-{year}-P{paper})
GET /api/papers - Returns papers list with ge_code
GET /api/papers/{id} - Returns paper with ge_code
GET /api/stats - Returns stats including total_mark_schemes
PATCH /api/questions/{id}/difficulty - Validates bronze/silver/gold only
PATCH /api/questions/{id}/topics - Validates against predefined topics
GET /api/questions - Returns empty array initially for a paper
POST /api/papers/{id}/upload - Accepts PDF (validates file requirement)
POST /api/papers/{id}/mark-scheme/upload - Accepts PDF for mark scheme extraction
GET /api/extraction-jobs/{job_id} - Returns extraction job status (404 for nonexistent)
GET /api/papers/{id}/mark-scheme - Returns 404 when no mark scheme exists
GET /api/mark-scheme-entries - Returns list endpoint
GET /api/questions/{id}/mark-scheme - Returns mark scheme entries for question
GET /api/questions/by-topic/{topic} - Returns questions filtered by topic
GET /api/questions/by-difficulty/{difficulty} - Returns questions filtered by difficulty
GET /api/questions/by-difficulty/{invalid} - Returns 400 for invalid difficulty
Frontend dashboard loads correctly
Frontend stats bar shows 5 stats including Schemes
Frontend paper creation shows GE code on paper list
Frontend dual upload zones (Question Paper + Mark Scheme) visible
Frontend topic filter dropdown exists
Frontend difficulty filter dropdown exists
Frontend refresh button works
KaTeX CSS properly imported for LaTeX rendering
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: React hydration warning in QuestionList - <span> inside <option> element. Consider using plain text interpolation instead of dynamic span wrapper.
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test papers with GE codes during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 features fully tested. GE ID system working (GE-{year}-P{paper}-Q{number}, sub-parts append A/B/C). 30 GCSE topics across 4 categories verified. Difficulty tagging (bronze/silver/gold) validation working. Mark scheme upload endpoint exists. Dual upload zones in frontend working. No questions have been extracted yet via PDF upload - would need actual PDF to test full extraction flow with GPT-5.2. LaTeX rendering via KaTeX is imported but not visually tested (no questions with LaTeX content exist yet).

ge_id_system.question_ge_id: GE-{year}-P{paper}-Q{number} - Code exists, needs extraction to test
ge_id_system.part_ge_id: GE-{year}-P{paper}-Q{number}{PART_LETTER} - Code exists, needs extraction to test
